sections.label: Problem Statement
sections.value: Mobile checkout abandonment is 68%, costing about $2M in annual revenue. The current flow has 9 form fields, no autofill, and three confirmation steps. Telemetry shows the biggest drop-off is on the shipping address screen (42% of abandons).

sections.label: Target Users
sections.value: Mobile shoppers aged 25-45 who add items to cart but do not complete purchase. Skewed toward iOS (62%). Average order value $84.

sections.label: Goals & Success Metrics
sections.value:
Cut abandonment from 68% to 45% in Q2.
Lift mobile conversion from 2.8% to 4.5%.
Raise checkout NPS from 32 to 50.

sections.label: User Stories & Requirements
sections.value: As a mobile shopper, I want autofill from Apple/Google Pay so I can pay in two taps. As a returning user, I want my last shipping address pre-selected. As a guest, I want to check out without creating an account.

sections.label: Scope & Constraints
sections.value: Out of scope: web checkout (separate project). Tech constraint: must stay on existing Stripe integration. Timeline: 8 weeks to GA.
